name: divider
title: Divider
description: Decorative horizontal or vertical visual separator for non-edge-to-edge separation. Supports surface-aware divider tokens, inset, and custom line length.

inset.description: Insets the divider from its start/end edges. Accepts spacing token names or any CSS length.

length.description: Visual line length. Defaults to filling the available axis. Accepts any CSS length.

orientation.description: Direction of the divider line. Defaults to 'horizontal'.

semantic.description: Expose the divider as a semantic separator. Visual-only dividers are hidden from assistive tech by default.

surface.description: Surface context so the divider uses the right TokoMo divider token.

peerDependencies.frameworks: Custom Elements; React 18/19 wrappers; Angular 19-22 standalone adapters.
